title: hieracium amphileion
intro: Hieracium amphileion, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Hieracium amphileion include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Hieracium amphileion can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
